findings.description: s3 hints contains the generic "ThreadContextHandler" but the handler queue and all flow steps use the specific variant names "ThreadContextHandler_main" and "ThreadContextHandler_request". Both specific names appear throughout the s3 content (handler queue positions 5 and 13, and in multiple flow step descriptions) and should be listed as hints.
findings.source_evidence: HandlerQueue: "ThreadContextHandler_main" (pos 5), "ThreadContextHandler_request" (pos 13); flow steps reference both variants explicitly.
